info.title: Kimi Code Server API
info.description: REST API for the Kimi Code local server. All JSON responses are wrapped in a uniform envelope `{ code, msg, data, request_id }`.

post.description: Start an OAuth device-code flow

get.description: Poll the current OAuth device-code flow

delete.description: Cancel the current OAuth device-code flow

post.description: Logout the managed OAuth provider

get.description: Get the managed account usage summary
Get the global Kimi configuration (secrets redacted)

post.description: Update the global Kimi configuration (merge semantics)
Set the global default model alias
Refresh provider model metadata. Use `:refresh` for all providers or `:refresh_oauth` for OAuth-backed providers only.
Refresh model metadata for a single provider

get.description: Get a configured provider by ID

post.description: Create a new session
Update session profile (title, metadata, agent_config)
Create a child session

get.description: Get realtime session status (best-effort in this slice)
Get the current session goal (null when none is active)

post.description: Export a session and diagnostic logs as a zip archive

200.description: Session export archive or JSON error envelope

get.description: List the skills available to a session
List the skills available to a workspace (no session required)

post.description: Activate a skill in a session (REST analogue of the /<skill> slash command)
Cancel a task

get.description: List pending approval requests for a session

post.description: Resolve an approval request

get.description: List pending question requests for a session

post.description: Resolve or dismiss a question Resolve uses the question response body; `:dismiss` sends an empty body.

get.description: List the active prompt and queued prompts for a session

post.description: Submit a prompt to a session
Steer queued prompts into the active turn
Abort a running prompt or steer a queued prompt
Register a workspace (idempotent on root)

delete.description: Unregister a workspace (does not remove on-disk content)

get.description: Browse local directories (server folder picker backend)
Folder picker landing payload: $HOME + recent workspace roots
Serve the raw content of any file on the host filesystem by absolute path. Supports ETag caching and single-range requests.

post.description: Upload a file

Filesystem action dispatcher. Supported actions: list, read, list_many, stat, stat_many, mkdir, search, grep, git_status, diff, open, open-in, reveal. The request and response schemas depend on the `fs:<action>` path tail and are represented as OpenAPI `oneOf` unions.

get.description: Download a file from the session workspace
Read a value by key (mirrors localStorage.getItem).

post.description: Write a value by key (mirrors localStorage.setItem).
Delete a value by key (mirrors localStorage.removeItem).
Delete all values (mirrors localStorage.clear).
Restart an MCP server by ID
Create a terminal for a session
Close a terminal

get.description: List active WebSocket clients connected to the server
Atomic session snapshot for client rebuild: state + as_of_seq watermark + epoch

Turn-granular session transcript page: live sessions read the in-memory store (wire-records backfill awaited per requested agent), cold sessions rebuild the requested agent from the persisted wire records

post.description: Gracefully shut down the server
Run a session action
